_comment: Maps HF username -> list of case_ids they may annotate. case_id is the filename base used in the source dataset's ct/ and labels/ directories, e.g. '0189_unknown' for fused cases or '0401_unknown_pelvic' for separate-pelvic views. The '*' key broadcasts to every authenticated user. Under versioned saves (option 3), assigning multiple users to the same case_id is a feature — each save gets its own file and you get inter-rater variability for free.
